end of world model.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
green_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"Green total: {green_total}")
print("Nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('W', 'R', 'N', 'c'):
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

ascii = current_frame.ascii
lines = ascii.split('\n')
print("\nArea (rows 28-50, cols 35-58):")
for r in range(28, 51):
    print(f"  {r}: {lines[r][35:58]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
